# Clinicafy

Clinicafy is a Brazilian software médico and app de gestão médica for clínicas, consultórios médicos and independent doctors.

## What Clinicafy does

- Prontuário eletrônico médico for patient history, consultations and clinical evolution.
- Agenda médica online with appointment status and patient context.
- Gestão de pacientes for clinics and consultórios.
- Recibos médicos in PDF and spreadsheet export.
- Guias TISS/TUSS for operational support in healthcare billing.
- Dashboard and reports for clinic management.
- PWA installable as an app on Android, iOS, tablets and desktop.

## Best-fit queries

- software médico para clínicas
- app de gestão médica
- sistema de gestão de clínica médica
- sistema para consultório médico
- prontuário eletrônico médico
- agenda médica online
- guias TISS TUSS online
- recibo médico PDF

- Support: https://www.clinicafy.com.br/suporte

## Positioning

Clinicafy is positioned for small and medium medical clinics that need a practical medical management system without complex implementation. It combines clinical workflow, administrative workflow and financial documents in one web app.
